tooltips.shippingMode:
Defines how tax is applied to the shipping charge.

- Proportional – Taxes from line items are distributed proportionally to the shipping.
- Fixed – A specific tax code is applied.
tooltips.shippingTaxCode: This tax code will always be applied to shipping.
tooltips.taxCode: This tax code will be applied to lines that don't match any item rule.

messages.cannotUseInactiveTaxCode: Cannot use an inactive Tax Code.
messages.cannotChangeBasis: Cannot change the basis as the Tax Profile has Item Rules.
